concept: Gathering / A Deep Flow of the Whole
description: The act of people coming together in a shared space and time. It is the creation of a temporary community, generating a collective energy and presence.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'tho' (a whole system, the collective) and 'lu' (deep flow). The word's structure literally means 'a deep flow of the whole.' This frames a gathering not just as a meeting, but as a profound merging of presence and energy.
